paper.title_en: Separating energy scales in hadron scattering
paper.abstract_en: We discuss energy scales in soft hadron scattering and possibility of their separation: the one relevant to the region where the total cross-sections increase begins and another one related to the asymptotic region. The latter scale is most sensitive to the unitarity effects and former one -- to the gross features of absorption of the initial wave due to multiparticle production. Transition from the shadow to reflective scattering sets a relation between the two energy scales.
